creator: borja@pexego.es
text:
Full update of the port to the version 5.0.11 of openerp-web.

Fixed some bugs in the rc.d script and the wrapper used to start the openerp-web service.

Improved the pkg-plist file.

I've tested the port in multiple systems, including:

 - 8.1-PRERELEASE
 - 8.0-RELEASE
 - 7-STABLE

Everything works fine in my tests so far.

Attached is a diff for the port, the diff file was compressed with bzip2 and then uuencoded into a .txt file. To get the original diff file:

uudecode -o openerp-web.diff.bz2 openerp-web.diff.bz2.txt && bzip2 -d openerp-web.diff.bz2

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
